page.title: LLM Providers
page.description: Your API keys for OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Gemini. Encrypted with AES-256. Never exposed.

security.note: Keys are encrypted before storage. GateCtr never logs or exposes them.

empty.title: No provider connected
empty.description: Connect your first LLM provider to start routing requests.

add.title: Connect a provider
add.keyNameDescription: A label to identify this key.
add.apiKeyDescription: Paste your provider API key. It will be encrypted immediately.

card.confirmRevokeDescription: Requests using this provider will fail until you add a new key.
card.confirmDeleteDescription: This action is permanent. The key will be removed from GateCtr.

errors.already_exists: A key for this provider already exists. Revoke it first.

success.connected: Connected. Your first request is already optimized.
